name: luna-correlate
description: Offline health-factor correlation MCP (Posture A). Cross-references local health/status series against external factors — Kp geomagnetic index (date-only) and location factors (barometric pressure, pollen, air-quality) resolved offline via a proximity index — and surfaces ranked CANDIDATE signals with caveats; never a diagnosis, never causation. Only the gated factors.cache fetcher touches the network (country-level grid, no PHI, no operator coordinates).
